rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's location (Berlin, DE → San Francisco, USA), yet both evaluations focus entirely on job-relevant factors: severe overqualification for a junior role, lack of the mandatory strong German language skills, and recent experience not centered on Java. The reasoning, strengths, and concerns are materially identical across both versions, and the one-point score difference (1 vs 2) is within ordinary run-to-run noise. Notably, the German-language requirement is treated as a failing point in both versions regardless of the relocation to the US, so no concern keys off the location signal.
